source_record_details.food_category: Other or unknown type of dairy
source_record_details.citation: Dineen (et al.), 1998: Persistence of Escherichia coli O157:H7 in dairy fermentation systems. Journal of Food Protection 61(12): 1602 - 1608

construction_notes: elicited_inputs derived from ComBase record_id 5076 (Other or unknown type of dairy / Yoghurt). N0 = log_cfu at lowest step. past/future_temperature_segments are an approximate human-readable split of the curve's duration (constant temperature); ground_truth_curve.values is the actual gridded trajectory. Some grid steps may be linearly interpolated between real lab readings rather than directly measured -- this is expected given sparse irregular sampling gridded onto fixed 15.15h intervals, not a data quality issue. Not a generalization claim -- used to sanity-check the elicit -> infer -> verdict pipeline end to end.
